topRepos.name: Recognizing-Handwritten-Digits-KNN-and-MLP
topRepos.description: This work is to build a machine learning system to categorise one of the UCI digit tasks. You should develop the system on your own from scratch. You should then run a two-fold test, and report your results.  The data is from the University of California at Irvine's Machine Learning Repository. It's the Optical Recognition of Handwritten Digits Data Set. This gives you two data sets, training set and a test set. I've converted them to two data sets data set 1 , and data set 2 that should be used by your system.
